caption: An older man with grey hair and glasses, wearing a light blue short-sleeved button-down shirt, stands behind a wooden podium speaking to an audience. He is positioned in a room with wood-paneled walls and horizontal blinds in the background. In front of him, the backs of several people's heads are visible as they listen to him. The podium features a logo with the word "LIBRARY" and a graphic. The text "ORCA" appears in a white box on the right side of the scene. As the sequence progresses, the camera angle shifts from a wide shot to a closer medium shot of the man. He looks down at papers on the podium and adjusts his position slightly while continuing to speak, gesturing with his hands. The lighting remains consistent throughout the clip, emphasizing the indoor setting.
